meta.in_world_date: 2026 — Year 4 after the Astral Gate accident
meta.masthead_note: Earth-produced, Mars-relayed via the first colony satellite

stocks.name: Gina Motors
stocks.note: Delays in Mars facility due to trade issues impact investor confidence

stocks.name: HexaChess
stocks.note: New partnerships and expansions into virtual reality

stocks.name: Pippu Cola
stocks.note: Ongoing competition and market saturation effects

stocks.name: First Solar Bank
stocks.note: Continues to benefit from stable currency environment

bounty_board.name: Rufus "The Lighthouse" Obara
bounty_board.crime: Hit four GATE tollbooths on the Tharsis line in one night

bounty_board.name: Sister Annalise Voss
bounty_board.crime: Ran a relief convoy that relieved itself of the relief; fraud on six moons

bounty_board.name: The Quiet Brothers
bounty_board.crime: Hijacked a water freighter out of Europa

bounty_board.name: Saboteur X
bounty_board.crime: Suspected in destabilizing Ganymede Gate systems; potential syndicate ties

Mars.note: acting like the capital; seizing strategic opportunities

Ganymede.note: further isolated by Mars' aggressive actions

Venus.note: prosperous, quiet rival; spore problem brewing

Belt.note: salvage and mining frontier; syndicate recruiting ground

Earth.note: showers near their worst; 1.5B survivors; sector government

GanymedeGate.note: suspected sabotage; extended inspections causing delays

Mars.note: land rush, strategic partnerships forming; hiring boom

Titan.note: NO WAR YET — that is the 2060s; keep desolate, unclaimed

businesses.name: ISSP
businesses.state: just launched the cowboy bounty program

businesses.name: Cherious Medical
businesses.state: powerful, slightly sinister; keep within allow-list

businesses.name: WcDonald's
businesses.state: survived the apocalypse intact; comic texture

businesses.name: Big Shot
businesses.state: bounty broadcast; cross-promo for our Bounty desk

businesses.name: Gina Motors
businesses.state: new Mars facility opening to meet growing demand

businesses.name: Pippu Cola
businesses.state: sells small comforts to a system with nothing

businesses.name: Helios Solar Freight
businesses.state: partners with Mars Coalition; logistics streamlined

businesses.name: Lumen Relay Co.
businesses.state: runs the Mars relay this paper rides on

businesses.name: Ganymede Blue
businesses.state: sea-rat and protein exports; affected by Mars tariffs

businesses.name: Tharsis Dome Works
businesses.state: builds Mars habitats; announcing hiring boom

characters.name: Independent Ring of Satellite Intelligence
characters.state: struggling with accuracy despite recent success
characters.visual: battered orbital satellite interior; green phosphor readouts; one lens turned toward a wounded Earth

characters.name: Antonio, Carlos & Jobim
characters.state: lost the Alba City domino league; insist they built the table
characters.visual: three weathered old men at a card table, mismatched, never quite looking at each other

characters.name: Mara Okonkwo
characters.visual: young woman, 19, oil-smudged coveralls, glow of an old terminal on her face

characters.name: Tomas Reyes
characters.state: mapped a drained Ganymede shelf on foot
characters.visual: lean figure in a worn exo-suit on a grey tidal flat, hand-drawn map under one arm

characters.name: Lila Nguyen
characters.visual: resourceful engineer amidst asteroid debris, sensor scanner in hand

characters.name: Navid Anwar
characters.visual: enthusiastic engineer tinkering with soil samples in a small depot on Io

characters.name: Asha Patel
characters.visual: determined miner in safety gear, standing amid asteroid rocks with a torch

characters.name: Mario Conti
characters.visual: determined farmer inspecting dome crops inside a vibrant, detailed biosphere

characters.name: Kaito Murakami
characters.state: captures stunning footage of rare meteor shower
characters.visual: excited drone operator controlling a UAV under a starry sky

threads.title: The Tharsis Accord & the Ganymede holdout
threads.summary: Ganymede retaliates by capturing a Mars freight vessel in disputed space.

threads.title: The cowboy program finds its feet
threads.summary: Sister Annalise Voss reportedly seen in Io's underground markets, prompting a new wave of bounty hunter activity.

threads.title: The Ganymede gate is not as stable as they say
threads.summary: Ganymede Gate's potential saboteur identified as a rogue element within the Mars Coalition.

threads.title: Mars learns to build for itself
threads.summary: Gina Motors' Mars facility faces delays in supply chain due to increased tariffs on Belt imports.

threads.title: The showers are getting worse
threads.summary: IRSI's forecast accuracy improves, predicting a light meteor impact over Greenland.

threads.title: The mysterious signal from Uranus
threads.summary: A mysterious signal from Uranus sparks scientific interest across the system.

issue_5: Mars intensifies space tensions, seizing a Ganymede cargo ship in a disputed zone.
Meteor showers continue to wreak havoc, this time hitting the Pacific Rim with force.
First Solar Bank reaffirms stability post-investigation, shares rebound.
Ganymede Gate remains under inspection, potential syndicate sabotage suspected.
New bounty posted for alleged saboteur connected to Ganymede Gate disruptions.
IRSI successfully predicts a potential impact over East Asia, regaining trust.
Asha Patel, a Belt miner, awarded for innovative safety measures after rescuing a crew during an asteroid collapse.
Helios Solar Freight partners with Mars Coalition to streamline off-world logistics amid gate concerns.
issue_6: Ganymede retaliates by capturing a Mars freight vessel in a bold countermove.
Meteor showers ease over Pacific Rim, leading to a temporary respite for the region.
Gina Motors announces new facility on Mars to meet rising demand, boosting investments.
ISSP identifies potential lead on Ganymede Gate saboteur, boosting security confidence.
The Quiet Brothers are captured near Titan in a dramatic cowboy-led operation.
IRSI forecasts a severe impact near Mediterranean, but prediction accuracy remains an issue.
New feature: Mario Conti, a dome farmer on Venus, advocates for spore-resistant crops.
Cherious Medical pushes for new pharmaceutical markets on Earth amidst health crises.
issue_7: A mysterious signal from Uranus sparks scientific interest across the system.
Rainfall increases unexpectedly near the Mediterranean due to a meteorological anomaly.
Gina Motors' Mars facility faces delays in supply chain due to increased tariffs on Belt imports.
Ganymede Gate's potential saboteur identified as a rogue element within the Mars Coalition.
Sister Annalise Voss reportedly seen in Io's underground markets, prompting a new wave of bounty hunter activity.
IRSI's forecast accuracy improves, predicting a light meteor impact over Greenland.
Kaito Murakami, a drone operator on Callisto, captures stunning footage of a rare meteor shower.
Lumen Relay Co. partners with Helios Solar Freight to enhance communication links between Earth and Mars.
